Document:
[color=#ffff00][head=3]Section 3: Metagaming Rules[/head][/color]
[color=#a4885c]3.1[/color] Use chat channels for their intended purpose. Keep IC channels for roleplay, and OOC channels for player discussion. ★
[color=#a4885c]3.2[/color] Do not engage in meta-communications (via Discord, OOC, or other third-party software) if said communication is to gain an advantage in any form of PvP content. ★
[color=#a4885c]3.3[/color] Do not intentionally, repeatedly, and maliciously continue to target another player for reasons of an OOC dislike of them (metagrudging). IC grudges are fine and acceptable where all parties are consenting. Please speak with each other if you suspect the other party may be unhappy with an IC grudge. [color=#f1c232]★★[/color]
